10.anchor: We also asked them their names, for your information, that we might write down the names of their leaders.

3.anchor: In the first year of Cyrus the king, Cyrus the king issued a decree: Concerning the house of God at Jerusalem, let the house be rebuilt, the place where sacrifices were offered, and let its foundations be retained. Its height shall be sixty cubits

11.note: The text of Ezra 7:12–26 is in Aramaic

12.anchor: scribe of the Law of the God of heaven. Peace.

69.anchor: the treasury of the work 61,000 darics

14.anchor: Now because we eat the salt of the palace
14.note: Aramaic because the salt of the palace is our salt

9.anchor: but has extended to us his steadfast love before the kings of Persia, to grant us some reviving to set up the house of our God, to repair its ruins, and to give us protection

of silver, and silver vessels worth 200 talents,
